Package ch.njol.skript.variables

package ch.njol.skript.variables
Code related to loading, handling, and saving variables. Some code is found in lang as well (e.g. in Variable).
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    ch.njol.skript
    The package for the bukkit plugin Skript.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FlatFileStorage
    A variable storage that stores its content in a comma-separated value file (CSV file).
    HintManager
    Used for managing local variable type hints during the parsing process.
    HintManager.Backup
    Represents a snapshot of a scope.
    MySQLStorage
     
    SerializedVariable
    An instance of a serialized variable, contains the variable name and the serialized value.
    SerializedVariable.Value
    A serialized value of a variable.
    SQLiteStorage
     
    SQLStorage
    TODO create a metadata table to store some properties (e.g.
    TypeHints
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Use HintManager.
    Variables
    Handles all things related to variables.
    VariablesStorage
    A variable storage is holds the means and methods of storing variables.
